system.description: Holy water is water that has been sanctified by a divine caster of 7th caster level or higher. It is used in certain religious rites. Crusaders often carry vials of holy water to use as weapons against the undead. A chaotic enchanted creature splashed with holy water suffers 1d8 {L!} damage for 2 rounds. Holy water cannot retain its holy power if it is stored in any other container than the special vials it is placed in when blessed.
